hypothesis: If a closed-loop Bayesian optimization platform (AdaCarbon) is used to vary bicarbonate temperature, bicarbonate concentration, bicarbonate flow rate, KOH concentration, KOH flow rate, and applied current density, then it will identify reactor conditions that maximize reactor yield and CO partial current density in reactive carbon electrolyzers within ~52 experiments and these optimized conditions will also improve performance when validated in realistic mixed bicarbonate–carbonate capture electrolytes.
